def: s.m. Looking to, looking at, observing, considering, referring to; respecting, respect or regard (for); expecting, waiting (for).
adj. Looking (at); looking forward (to); looking out (for), waiting (for), expecting, awaiting.

adj. & postpn. Contrary, adverse, opposed, opposite, hostile (to); cross-grained, cross, inverted, reverse, perverse, refractory, ungracious, disagreeable; unworthy; — the opposite or contrary (of, -ke), the reverse (of).
s.f. = S پرتکولتو प्रतिकूलत्व prati-kūlatva, s.m. Adverseness, opposition, hostility; perverseness, contumacy.
s.m. = S پرتکولتا प्रतिकूलता prati-kūlatā, s.f. Adverseness, opposition, hostility; perverseness, contumacy.
s.m. Receiving, taking, obtaining, getting; censure, reviling, abuse.

adj. & s.m. 'Against the hair,' contrary to the natural course or order, reverse, inverted; disagreeable, unpleasant; low, vile, base, depraved; left (not right); — a base-born person; any disagreeable or injurious act
subs: prati-lomaj, s.m. A person born from the adverse mixture of different castes (as of a Kshatriya father and Brāhmanī mother, or of a Vaiśya father and a Kshatriya or Brāhmanī mother, in which case the wife is of a higher caste than the husband).

def: s.f. Image, likeness, resemblance, picture, figure, statue, idol; the part of an elephant's head between the tusks; a metre consisting of twelve syllables.
more: n. f. S. प्रतिमा to imitate. An image; idol.
s. f. Image, statue, picture, likeness.

def: s.m. Counterpart, match; model, pattern; image, picture, &c. ( = prati-mā, q.v.).
adv. Every month, monthly, from month to month, month by month.
adj. Of or pertaining to every month, monthly.
s.f. Corresponding form, the counterpart of any real form, image, resemblance, likeness.
s.f. A species of rat.
s.m. Echo, resonance, reverberation ( = prati-dhvani).
s.m. Substitute, representative, proxy, deputy, vicegerent; a surety; a resemblance of a real form, image, likeness, statue, picture
subs: s.m. The work of a substitute, &c.; embassy
v.n. To act as a substitute, &c.; to take security.

def: s.f. = S پرتندهتو प्रतिनिधित्व prati-nidhitva, s.m. The status or the condition of a substitute, &c.; lieutenancy, ambassadorship.
s.m. = S پرتندهتا प्रतिनिधिता prati-nidhitā, s.f. The status or the condition of a substitute, &c.; lieutenancy, ambassadorship.
adv. Night by night, night after night, every night, nightly, by night.
adj. Against the grain, opposite, adverse, contrary, opposed, contradictory, reverse; inverted, out of order, disordered; resisting, perverse, refractory, disobedient, cross, obstinate.
s.m. = prati-pakshi, q.v. s.m. Rival, opponent, adversary.
s.f. = prati-pat, q.v. s.f. The first day of a lunar fortnight, the first day of the moon's increase or wane (esp. of the former); understanding, intelligence; rank, consequence.
adv. At every step, at each step, step by step; on every occasion, every moment, continually; at every place, everywhere; in every word, at every word.

s.m. Imparting, giving, presenting; donation, gift; appointing, producing, exciting, causing, accomplishing, effecting; enunciating, treating of, discussing, expounding, explaining, teaching, affirming, declaring; ascertaining, establishing, proving, substantiating
s.m. (in Gram.), The crude form of a noun, a noun in its uninflected state.

part. Given, delivered, presented; caused, produced, accomplished, effected; declared, represented, stated, enunciated, asserted, proved, established, maintained, ascertained; explained, expounded, treated of.
part. adj. To be treated of, to be discussed, to be explained or expounded.
s.m. Rival, opponent, adversary.
s.m. Protecting, guarding, defending, cherishing, patronizing, protection, fostering, rearing, breeding; entertaining; — cherisher, patron, &c. = prati-pālak, q.v.
more: n. m. 1. Protection; support; sustenance; patronage. 2. Cherisher; patron ( murabbī ); protector.
s. m. Patronising, protection, fostering, rearing, breeding, cherishing.

def: adj. & s.m. Protecting, defending, preserving, cherishing; — protector, guardian, benefactor, nourisher, cherisher, patron; a king.
s.m. = prati-pāl, q.v. s.m. Protecting, guarding, defending, cherishing, patronizing, protection, fostering, rearing, breeding; entertaining; — cherisher, patron, &c. = prati-pālak, q.v.
part. Protected, cherished; practised, followed.

v.t. = prati-pal karnā, q.v.s.v. prati-pāl. s.m. Protecting, guarding, defending, cherishing, patronizing, protection, fostering, rearing, breeding; entertaining; — cherisher, patron, &c. = prati-pālak, q.v.
more: v.a. To preserve, to keep, to cherish.

def: part. Come up to, approached, reached, obtained, gained; done, effected, accomplished; known, understood, ascertained, determined; assented to, agreed to, accepted, admitted.
s.f. = S پرتپنتو प्रतिपन्नत्व prati-pannatva, s.m. The being reached, or acquired, &c.; proof, demonstration.
s.m. = S پرتپنتا प्रतिपन्नता prati-pannatā, s.f. The being reached, or acquired, &c.; proof, demonstration.
s.f. The first day of a lunar fortnight, the first day of the moon's increase or wane (esp. of the former); understanding, intelligence; rank, consequence.

s.f. Gaining, getting, obtaining, acquirement, gain; becoming aware of, perception, ascertainment, determination, knowledge; acquirement of rank or dignity, reputation, fame, renown; honouring, worshipping, honour, respectful behaviour.
s.m. Return, reward, recompense, remuneration, requital, retaliation, retribution
subs: s.m. Rewarder, recompenser, avenger, an epithet of the Deity.

def: s.m. Counter-order, countermand, suspension of a general prohibition in a particular case, license for an act which under other circumstances is forbidden.
adj. & s.m. Doing homage, honouring; — one who does homage, a reverer, venerator, adorer, worshipper.
s.m. Doing homage, showing respect, honouring; exchange of civilities, mutual obeisance or reverence.
adv. Man by man. every man, for each man.
s.m. A shore, bank.
s.m. Preserving, preservation, protection.
adv. Each night, every night, nightly.
s.m. Opposition, impediment, obstruction, obstacle, hinderance, stoppage; siege, blockade.
adj. & s.m. Opposing, obstructing, hindering, stopping; besieging; opponent; obstacle; robber, thief.
adj. & s.m. Opposing, obstructing, hindering, stopping; besieging; opponent; obstacle; robber, thief.
s.m. The counterpart of any real form, an image, resemblance, representation, likeness, picture.
s.m. Reverberating sound, reverberation, echo, resonance.
s.f. Fear or anxiety (on account of); constant fear or doubt.

adj. & s.m. Going towards; following, dependent, subject to, servile; — a cord or ribbon worn round the neck or wrist at nuptials, &c. (as an amulet); an ornament, bracelet, wreath, garland; — a follower, servant, dependant; — a form of magic or incantation; — cicatrizing or healing (as a sore).

s.m. Continued creation out of primitive matter; secondary creation, or the creation of the world by the agency of Brahmā and other divinities regarded as the agents of one Supreme Being; dissolution; the portion of a Purāna which treats of the destruction and renovation of the world.
s.m. Keeping or warding off, keeping back (of a disease, &c.); forbidding, prohibition; denial, refusal; negation, contradiction; rejection; exception.
part. Prohibited, forbidden; refused, denied, disallowed; contradicted.
adj. Famous, renowned.

s.f. Standing still, resting, remaining in; resting-place, site, foundation; fixity, constitution, strength; a high or honourable position, dignity, rank, high authority; celebrity, fame, notoriety; installation, inauguration; the consecration of a temple, or a monument or image, in honour of a deity; the setting up of an idol; the endowment of a temple; portioning a daughter; the performance of rights or ceremonies for the completion of a vow; accomplishment, completion; a metre of four lines of four syllables each; a variety of the Gāyatrī metre (consisting of three lines of eight, seven, and six syllables respectively)
more: s. f. 1. Celebrity, renown. 2. Consecration of a monument erected in honour of a deity or of the image of a deity.
subs: v.t. To instal, inaugurate; to set up (an idol); to consecrate (a temple), &c.

def: n. f. 1. Position; rank. 2. See شـﮩرت 3. The consecration or endowment of a temple. 4. The marriage portion of a daughter. 5. ( Pros .) A metre consisting of a stanza of four lines of four syllables each; a variety of Gāyatrī metre consisting of three lines of eight, seven, and six syllables respectively.

s.m. Firm standing; standing place, ground, foundation, base; foot, leg; site, situation; — name of a town at the confluence of the Ganges and Jamna (on the left bank of the Ganges, opposite to Allahabad), the capital of the early kings of the lunar dynasty; name of a town on the Godāvarī, the capital of Sālivāhan.

part. adj. & s.m. Set up, erected; established, nxed, placed, situated; established in life, married; portioned, endowed; consecrated, inaugurated, installed; completed, finished, effected; experienced, conversant with; famous, celebrated, renowned, illustrious, — a celebrated or famous person, &c.
s.f. Emulation, rivalry.
adj. & s.m. Emulous, envious; refractory, rebellious; — a rival.
s.m. One who promises or assents, promiser.
part. & s.m. Promised, assented, agreed, accepted, granted; — a promise, assent; an engagement; an echo.
s.f. = S پرتشيايه प्रतिश्याय prati-śyāya, s.m. A cold, catarrh.
s.m. = prati-śyāyā, q.v.
s.m. = S پرتشيا प्रतिश्या pratiśyā, s.f. A cold, catarrh.
part. Gone away; gone by, past; acknowledged, proved; believed, trusted; experienced, known, well-known, famous, celebrated, renowned; trusting, believing; satisfied, glad, pleased, delighted
more: n. f. S. प्रतीति. Faith; belief; confidence; trust. 1. Tulsī, apno jānke kīnī thī partīt; Dhoko de nyāre bhaë, bhalī nibhāī pīt? Tulsī Dās. Tulsī, your life you trusted as your own held dear, She played you false and fled—such constancy was here! 2. Pāchhe rupaiyā det haiṅ, let tamassuk mīt, Tulsī, kāhū kī nahīṅ ab jāno partīt . Tulsī Dās. Tulsī, your bond your friend first takes before he'll money lend, No one another trusts, of truth and virtue now an end. 3. Apnā aëpan lāë-ke tiryā pūjat bhīt, Suphal hot man kāmnā, Tulsī, pirem partīt . Tulsī Dās. Her votive offering brought the woman claps against the wall, Tulsī, in loving faith her heart's desires accomplished all. 4. Parāī lugaiyā kī, ke partīt? Khā gaī laṛvā, dekhā gaī pīṭ . Prov. You ne'er can trust another's wife, vain hope eschew, She 'll eat up all the cakes and turn her back on you. partīt karnā , v. a. To believe; trust; co…
s. f. Faith. confidence, trust. پرتيت کرنا partīt karnā, 1. To examine. 2. To believe. 3. To trust.
subs: (˚īta+ar˚), adj. Having a recognized or acknowledged meaning.

def: s.m. A particular tune, a kind of air or melody.

s.f. Clear apprehension or insight (into), clear notion (of), distinct conception; complete understanding or ascertainment, knowledge, experience; conviction; faith, belief; trust, credit; fame, notoriety
subs: (or partīt) karnā (-kī), To form a distinct conception (of), to examine; to believe; to trust (in), rely (on), put faith (in), &c.

def: s.m. Answer, reply, rejoinder; an echo.
s.m. = S پرتواکيه प्रतिवाक्य prati-vākya, s.m. = S پرتوان प्रतिवाणि prati-vāṇi, s.f. = prati-vāć q.v.
s.m. Answer, reply, rejoinder; altercation, quarrel.
adj. & s.m. = prati-bādhī, q.v. adj. & s.m. Opposing; — opponent, adversary; defendant.

adj. & s.m. Answering, replying, rejoining, responding; contradicting; disobedient, contending against, refractory; calumniating, slandering; — an opponent (in controversy, &c.); defendant, respondent.
s.f. The state or situation of a respondent or defendant at law.
s.m. = S پرتوان प्रतिवाणि prati-vāṇi, s.f. = S پرتوچن प्रतिवचन prati-vaćan, s.m. = prati-vāć q.v.
s.f. = S پرتواکيه प्रतिवाक्य prati-vākya, s.m. = S پرتوچن प्रतिवचन prati-vaćan, s.m. = prati-vāć q.v.
s.m. Inserting (as an ingredient); adding (to, esp. in mixing medicines), throwing (into); calcining or fluxing metals; an epidemic disease, pestilence, plague.
adv. Every year, each year, year by year, yearly.
s.m. = prati-bās, q.v. s.m. Neighbourhood.
adj. & s.m. See prati-bāsī.
s.m. Reflection, &c. v. prati-bimb.
part. Reflected (as an image).
s.f. lit. 'Counteracting poison'; a birch tree, Atis betula.
adj. Being trusted or believed, admitted.
s.m. Antagonist, adversary, opponent.
s.m. Opposition, resistance, enmity, repulsion; controversy, contradiction; co-operation, association.

adj. & s.m. Opposing, counteracting, impeding; cooperating (with); corresponding or answering (to); equally matched; — opponent, enemy, antagonist, rival; a partner, associate, coadjutor; a counterpart, match.
s.f. = S پرتيوگتو प्रतियोगित्व prati-yogitva, s.m. Opposition; existence as a counterpart, equality in power; mutual co-operation, partnership.
s.m. = S پرتيوگتا प्रतियोगिता prati-yogitā, s.f. Opposition; existence as a counterpart, equality in power; mutual co-operation, partnership.
s.f. A kind of nervous disease (in which pain is felt to extend itself from the rectum and organs of generation towards the bowels).
( Gram .) An affix to roots and words forming derivatives and inflections.
s.m. Counter plaint or charge, counter accusation, an accusation brought against the accuser or plaintiff, recrimination.

adj. = praty-aṅć, q.v. adj. (f. pratīćī). Turned (towards), directed (towards), proceeding (to); being behind, coming from behind; subsequent, following (in time or place); western, westerly, west; uniform ( = pratyaṅć)
subs: pratyak-pushpī, s.f. A species of plant, Achyranthes aspera
s.f. Name of various plants, Anthericum Tuberosum; Croton polyandrum, or C. Tiglium; Salvinia cucullata (com. called dantī).

def: adj. = praty-aksh, q.v. s.m. & adv. Perceptible to the eye, in sight, perceptible, visible, sensible, cognizable by any of the organs of sense; clear, distinct, evident, manifest, apparent, tangible, undoubted, express, explicit, actual, real; — presence; perceptibility, distinctness; observation, inspection; — in the sight (of), in the presence (of); with direct personal knowledge, distinctly, clearly
subs: s.m. Ocular or visible proof, the evidence of the senses; an organ or faculty of perception
s.m. Seeing with one's own eyes; an eye-witness

def: See پرتچهـ partachh.

s.m. Order, command; information, informing, apprising, annunciation, declaration; warning, caution, supernatural warning; rejection, disallowance, refusal, denial, repudiation, prevention; rendering obscure, obscuring, eclipsing.
part. Prescribed, recommended; informed, apprised; declared; warned, cautioned; rejected, repulsed; removed, set aside.
s.m. Coming back, coming again, return.
Come back, come again, returned; arrived at.
adv. Day by day, every day, daily; in the morning.
adv. Day by day, every day, daily; in the morning.

s.m. Drawing back (troops), retreat; withholding, taking back; withdrawing the senses from external objects, restraint of the organs of sense, abstraction; compendium, abridgement; (in Gram.) the comprehension of a series of letters or affixes into one syllable effected by combining the first member of the series without its indicatory letter or letters with the indicatory final consonant of the last member; a group or class of letters so combined (for the concise expression of grammatical rules; thus the pratyāhār ać is the technical term for all the vowels, and the pratyāhār hal is the term for all the consonants).
adj. (f. pratīćī). Turned (towards), directed (towards), proceeding (to); being behind, coming from behind; subsequent, following (in time or place); western, westerly, west; uniform ( = pratyaṅć)
subs: pratyak-pushpī, s.f. A species of plant, Achyranthes aspera
s.f. Name of various plants, Anthericum Tuberosum; Croton polyandrum, or C. Tiglium; Salvinia cucullata (com. called dantī).

def: s.m. & adv. Perceptible to the eye, in sight, perceptible, visible, sensible, cognizable by any of the organs of sense; clear, distinct, evident, manifest, apparent, tangible, undoubted, express, explicit, actual, real; — presence; perceptibility, distinctness; observation, inspection; — in the sight (of), in the presence (of); with direct personal knowledge, distinctly, clearly
subs: s.m. Ocular or visible proof, the evidence of the senses; an organ or faculty of perception
s.m. Seeing with one's own eyes; an eye-witness

def: adj. & s.m. Seeing or perceiving with one's own eyes, perceiving by the senses; — one who has the exercise of his senses; — an eye-witness; — s.f. Consciousness of what is perceptible, &c.
subs: part. Made present or visible, manifested, displayed.

def: v.t. To confide in, to trust.
adj. & s.m. & adv. Closely connected (with), immediately following, next, standing nearest (as an heir): — the nearest or next heir; — immediately after; next in succession.

adj. = pratyak, q.v. adj. (f. pratīćī). Turned (towards), directed (towards), proceeding (to); being behind, coming from behind; subsequent, following (in time or place); western, westerly, west; uniform ( = pratyaṅć)
subs: pratyak-pushpī, s.f. A species of plant, Achyranthes aspera
s.f. Name of various plants, Anthericum Tuberosum; Croton polyandrum, or C. Tiglium; Salvinia cucullata (com. called dantī).

def: s.f. lit. 'That which comes behind,' (the bow), bow-string.

s.m. & adv. A minor or secondary member of the body (as the forehead, nose, chin, ears, &c.), an organ of perception, a limb of the body; a division, section, part, subdivision (of a science, &c.); — on every limb, on the limbs severally; limb by limb.
adj. & s.m. Bordering (on); adjacent or contiguous (to), skirting; — border, frontier; a bordering country, i.e. a country occupied by barbarians, the country of the Mleććhas or savages.
adj. & s.m. Hostile, inimical; opposing; — an enemy, opponent, adversary, rival; (in law) a defendant.
s.f. = praty-āśā, q.v.
s.f. Confidence, reliance, trust, hope, expectation, desire.
s.f. Immediate proximity (in space, time, &c.); close contact, juxta-position; analogy.
adj. & s.m. Hoping, expecting, trusting, relying upon; — an expectant ( = umedwār).
s.m. Red chalk.

s.m. Decrease, diminution, privation, detriment, harm; reverse, opposite course, contrary course or proceeding, contrariety; offence, sin; disappearance (of anything that exists); non-production (of what does not exist).
adj. Detrimental, attended with loss; suffering.
s.f. Coming back, return.

s.m. Belief, firm conviction, trust, faith, reliance, assurance, confidence; certainty, ascertainment, proof, truth; knowledge, experience; apprehension, understanding, intellect; decisive sentence; oath; ordeal; instrument, means of agency; celebrity, fame; (in Gram.) an affix to roots and words forming derivatives and inflections; (in the tenets of Buddhists) a concurrent occasion of an event as distinguished from its proximate cause.
adj. & s.m. Having faith (in), trusting, believing, relying (upon); deserving trust or confidence; a trustworthy person; a believer.
adj. & s.m. Related to, or attended with, confidence or trust, confidential, trusty, having faith in: — a surety.
part. Confided (in), relied (upon), trusted, trusty, confidential.
adj. & adv. Each, every, each one, each single one, every one; — one by one, one at a time, singly, severally.
s.f. = S پرتيکتو प्रत्येकत्व praty-ekatva, s.m. Respectiveness, &c.
s.m. = S پرتييکتا प्रत्येकता praty-ekatā, s.f. Respectiveness, &c.
s.m. Going forth towards, going out to meet (a guest, &c.); rising as a mark of respect ( = praty-utthān).
s.m. Obstacle, impediment, hindrance.
part. Said in return. replied, answered.
s.f. Reply, answer, rejoinder.
s.m. Requital of aid or assistance, mutual assistance; returning a service or favour, return of a kindness, gratitude.
adj. & s.m. Requiting a favour, returning a kindness, grateful; — a grateful person.
adj. & s.m. Requiting a favour, returning a kindness, grateful; — a grateful person.
s.m. = pratyush, q.v. s.m. Morning twilight, day-break, morning, dawn.
s.m. Morning twilight, day-break, morning, dawn.
s.m. Morning twilight, day-break, morning, dawn.
adj. & s.m. Present; ready, prompt; reproduced, regenerated; (in Arith.) produced by multiplication, multiplied; — multiplication; the product of a sum in multiplication.
s.m. A reply to an answer, answer, rejoinder, retort.
s.m. Rising from a seat as a mark of respect, rising to welcome a visitor, respectful reception.
adj. See prauṛh.
adj. Able, clever.
adj. Grown up, full-grown; mature, adult, old; married; conndent, bold, arrogant, audacious; able, clever.
s.f. A married woman from thirty to thirty-five years of age; a violent or impetuous woman.
s.f. = H پروڙهتو प्रौढ़त्व prauṛhatva, s.m. Strength, confidence; arrogance, &c. (see pauṛhāʼī).
s.m. = H پروڙهتا प्रौढ़ता prauṛhatā, s.f. Strength, confidence; arrogance, &c. (see pauṛhāʼī).
s.f. Growth, increase; maturity, full development; sense of power, self-confidence; arrogance, audacity, boldness; zeal, enterprise, exertion; investigation, discussion, controversy.
adj. Declaratory, explanatory, significant, technical (term).
s.m. Declaring; announcement; teaching, expounding, exposition, explication, interpretation.
s.m. Speaking, discourse, conversation; a saying, popular talk, rumour, report; a proverb; a fable, myth; litigious language.
s.m. Wind, air; one of the seven vāyus or winds; an epithet of Indra.

s.m. Stream, current, flow, flux, course; running water; continuous flow or passage; anything moving forward like a stream; current of human affairs; course of action; usage, custom, activity; life, occupation; a drove of cattle; a pond; a beautiful or swift horse.
adj. & s.m. Carrying forwards, carrying off, bearing or carrying well; — one who carries well; a Rākshas, imp, demon, goblin.
s.m. The act of flowing; a covered carriage; a litter or carriage for women (see parohan).
s.f. A sudden desire to evacuate, diarrhœa.
s.m. One who speaks or declares, speaker, declarer, announcer, informer; propounder, teacher, expounder.
adj. & s.m. Imposing upon, deceitful, fraudulent, treacherous; — impostor, cheat, &c.
s.f. Imposition, imposture, deceit, fraud, treachery.
part. Imposed upon, deceived, cheated.
s.m. One who sows seed, a sower.

s.m. One of the forty-nine gotras or families (as opp. to the eight original gotras); a member of a line of ancestors, an ancestor; a muni who contributes to the credit of a particular gotra or family; family, race, lineage, kindred, offspring, descendants; — adj. Most excellent, chief, principal, best; distinguished, exalted, eminent.
s.m. Prohibition, objection, opposition; a desirable gift.
s.m. Commencement, engagement; excitement, stimulus, incentive, instigation; — adj. Engaged (in), undertaking; appointed; ready, determined.

adj. & s.m. Setting in motion or action, setting on foot; inducing, inciting, prompting, instigating, stimulating, urging; — original instigator (of), originator, causer, author, principal, founder; arbiter, judge; (in dramatic language) the entrance of a character on the stage.
s.m. Living abroad, &c. = prabās, q.v. s.m. Living abroad or away from home, sojourning in a foreign country; foreign residence (temporarily); travelling; journey.
s.m. Sending away from home, exile, banishment; dwelling abroad, sojourning, lodging; killing, slaying.
s.m. Going abroad, setting out on a journey; sojourning in a foreign country.
adj. Dwelling abroad, being absent from home.
adj. & s.m. Dwelling abroad, &c. = prabāsī, q.v. adj. & s.m. Sojourning abroad; — sojourner abroad, one who lives away from home; traveller.
s.m. Barley.
s.m. Foreseeing; foresight.
part. Foreseen, anticipated.
adj. Foreseeing, anticipating.
s.m. A yellow variety of the kidney bean, Phaseolus mungo.
s.f. A braid of hair; the hair twisted and unadorned (as worn by widows, and by wives in the absence of their husbands).

s.m. Entering (into); entrance, ingress, penetrating, penetration; admission, access (syn. daḵẖl); a religious ceremony performed previous to entering a new house, &c.; intentness (on an object), engaging closely (in a pursuit or purpose)

s.m. Entering (into); entrance, ingress, penetrating, penetration; admission, access (syn. daḵẖl); a religious ceremony performed previous to entering a new house, &c.; intentness (on an object), engaging closely (in a pursuit or purpose)
more: n. S. विश to enter. 1. Ingress; entrance; admission; access. Brij birahā basant keyo parbesh . Bhajan. 2. The religious ceremony observed previous to inhabiting a new house.

def: adj. & s.m. Going (into), entering, penetrating; — entry; an interlude.
s.m. Entering (into); entrance (to a house, &c.), principal door or gate.
adj. = pra-veśak, q.v. adj. & s.m. Going (into), entering, penetrating; — entry; an interlude.
s.m. Barley.
s.m. Division, separation, part, portion, share.
part. Sundered, separated; divided, distributed, partitioned, apportioned, shared.
s.f. Fame, renown, reputation, celebrity.
adj. & s.m. Intelligent, skilful, knowing, clever, proticient, excellent, accomplished, conversant (with); — an able person, an adept, &c.
more: adj. Intelligent, skilful, knowing, conversant, accomplished, clever.

def: s.f. = S پروينتو प्रवीणत्व pra-vīṇatva, s.m. Skill, cleverness, proficiency, sagaciousness, acuteness, shrewdness, ability.
s.m. = S پروينتا प्रवीणता pra-vīṇatā, s.f. Skill, cleverness, proficiency, sagaciousness, acuteness, shrewdness, ability.
s.m. Skilfulness, cleverness; accurate knowledge.
s.m. A species of fragrant wood, yellow sandal.
adj. & s.m. Heroic, brave, strong, powerful; best, most excellent; — a hero, warrior, chief, prince, a person of rank or distinction.
part. Entered (into), gone (into), come (into); entered (upon), begun, commenced, engaged (in), occupied (with).
s.m. = prāvr̤iṭ; prāvr̤ish, q.v.
s.m. The rainy season, the rains, the two months Sāwan and Bhādoṅ (July and Aug.)
subs: s.f. A kind of weed which grows most luxuriantly during the rains, Boerhavia procumbens; cowach, Carpopogon pruriens
s.m. The Kadamb tree, Nauclea cadamba.

def: s.m. The rainy season, the rains, the two months Sāwan and Bhādoṅ (July and Aug.)
subs: s.f. A kind of weed which grows most luxuriantly during the rains, Boerhavia procumbens; cowach, Carpopogon pruriens
s.m. The Kadamb tree, Nauclea cadamba.

def: s.m. = S پراورتا प्रावृता prāvr̤itā, s.f. Veil, mantle, cloak, wrapper.
s.f. = S پراورت प्रावृत prāvr̤it, s.m. Veil, mantle, cloak, wrapper.
part. Settled, fixed, determined; done; begun, commenced; engaged (in, -meṅ), occupied (with); beginning, undertaking, doing, acting.
s.f. Enclosure, fence, hedge.

s.f. Continuous flow onwards, progress, advance; stream, current; rise, source, origin, beginning; activity, effort, employment, occupation; active life (as opp. to a life of contemplation); giving or applying oneself (to, -meṅ), engaging (in), undertaking; tendency (to), addiction (to), inclination, predilection (for); application, use, employment; continued application, perseverance; practice, conduct, behaviour; currency, continuance, continuity; the applicableness or validity of a rule; news, tidings, intelligence; the juice that exudes from the temples of an elephant in rut; name of any holy place; (in Gram.) the crude form (of a word); (in Arith.) the multiplier

s.m. Going away, departure; departure from life; seeking death by fasting, sitting down and fasting to death (as a religious or penitentiary act, or, like the practice of sitting in dharnā, to enforce compliance with a demand); principal part, largest portion; plurality, majority, majority of cases, general rule; quantity, abundance, plenty, excess; banquet, feast; — a stage or condition of life, age; (as a suffix, or a prefix), almost, like, resembling (e.g. amr̤it-prāya, 'like nectar')
subs: prāya-dīp, s.m. 'Almost an island,' a peninsula ( = upa-dvīp)
(for prāya-ćitta, the ś being euphonic), s.m. Expiation, expiatory act, atonement, penance, satisfaction, compensation, indemnification, amends ( = vulg. parāćit; parāśćit)
s.m. One who effects expiation, or makes atonement
s.f. Any work prescribing the rules of expiation
s.m. = prāyaśćitt-kartā, q.v.: prāyaśćitt-vidhi, s.f. A prescribed rule of penance or expiation.

def: adv. For the most part, mostly, chiefly; generally, commonly, usually; about, nearly, nearly all; in all probability, most likely; abundantly, largely.

s.m. 'Sacrifice, oblation'; 'the place of sacrifice'; name of a celebrated place of pilgrimage (commonly called Allahabad) at the confluence of the Ganges and Jamna with the supposed subterranean Sarasvatī (whence the other name tri-veṇī, 'the three streams.' Prayāg, in composition, is applied to other sacred places situated at the confluence of two rivers, e.g. deva-prayāg, rudra-prayāg, karṇa-prayāg, nanda-prayāg, in the Himalaya mountains)
more: s. m. A celebrated place of pilgrimage, the confluence of the Ganges and Jamunā with the supposed subterraneous addition of the Saraswatī; the modern Ilāhābād.
subs: s.m. A Hindoo priest of Prayāg.

def: s.m. Departure from life, death, voluntary death ( = prāya).
s.m. Setting out, departing, departure, starting (on a journey); going forth, going to a distance, journey, march; invasion, attack; death
subs: s.m. Time of departure; time of death; death.

def: adv. See پرايه prāya.
s.m. Effort, exertion, labour, pains, endeavour; desire (for); pursuit (of).
s.m. = prā-yaśćit, q.v.s.v. prāya.
s.m. = prāyaśćit, q.v.s.v. prāyas.

s.m. See s.v. prāya. s.m. Going away, departure; departure from life; seeking death by fasting, sitting down and fasting to death (as a religious or penitentiary act, or, like the practice of sitting in dharnā, to enforce compliance with a demand); principal part, largest portion; plurality, majority, majority of cases, general rule; quantity, abundance, plenty, excess; banquet, feast; — a stage or condition of life, age; (as a suffix, or a prefix), almost, like, resembling (e.g. amr̤it-prāya, 'like nectar')
subs: prāya-dīp, s.m. 'Almost an island,' a peninsula ( = upa-dvīp)
(for prāya-ćitta, the ś being euphonic), s.m. Expiation, expiatory act, atonement, penance, satisfaction, compensation, indemnification, amends ( = vulg. parāćit; parāśćit)
s.m. One who effects expiation, or makes atonement
s.f. Any work prescribing the rules of expiation
s.m. = prāyaśćitt-kartā, q.v.: prāyaśćitt-vidhi, s.f. A prescribed rule of penance or expiation.

ety: the preceding+S. aff. इन्, nom. ई
def: adj. Energetic, laborious, diligent, industrious, persevering.
s.m. Persevering effort, continued exertion or endeavour; activity, action, attempt, active effort
subs: v.n. To make an effort, to attempt, to endeavour
adj. & s.m. Assiduous, persevering, enterprising, active, energetic, zealous; — one who endeavours or makes effort, one who directs his whole attention and care (to).

def: s.m. Application, employment (of); use, usage, practice; procedure; act, action, effort, exertion, direction; occasion, cause, motive, object; consequence, result; contrivance, device, plan; an example, comparison; exhibition, performance, representation (of a play); a formula (to be recited), sacred text, authority; capital bearing interest, principal, loan.
adj. & s.m. Having some object in view, striving for an object; calculated for a particular purpose; using, applying; causing, stimulating; — one who strives for any object, &c.
adj. = pra-yojya, q.v. part. adj. Proper to be used or employed; to be practised; to be occasioned or produced; to be put forth or represented; fit, suitable, proper, necessary
subs: s.m. A servant, slave; capital, principal, 'that which is put out to interest.'

def: adj. & s.m. Occasioning, effecting, conducing (to), causing or inducing (any act), leading (to); instigating, prompting, arousing, stimulating, exciting; deputing, appointing; — an original instigator, author (of any act); founder or institutor (of any ceremony); a law-giver, legislator; author, composer; a money-lender, creditor.
s.m. Employment, use (of); need (of), necessity (for), exigence, demand; cause, occasion, motive, origin; inducement; purpose, object, aim, intention, design; profit, interest, advantage
more: n. S. प्र and युज apply. 1. Occasion; necessity; cause (ارتهـ 7, 8). 2. The ceremony of shaving a child's head and boring his ears for the first time. Hin.
s. Occasion, motive, affair, necessity, demand, design.
subs: adj. Having a particular use, aim, or purpose; done with a particular aim or design, designing, purposing; selfish; serviceable.

def: adj. = prayojanik, q.v. adj. Necessary, requisite.
adj. Necessary, requisite.
part. adj. Proper to be used or employed; to be practised; to be occasioned or produced; to be put forth or represented; fit, suitable, proper, necessary
subs: s.m. A servant, slave; capital, principal, 'that which is put out to interest.'

def: part. adj. Proper to be used or employed; to be practised; to be occasioned or produced; to be put forth or represented; fit, suitable, proper, necessary
subs: s.m. A servant, slave; capital, principal, 'that which is put out to interest.'

def: part. Joined (to), harnessed, yoked; used, employed; applied; associated or connected (with); endowed (with), possessing (as an attribute); compact, closely united, dense; produced (by), arising (from), occasioned (by), in consequence (of), owing (to).
s.m. A million.

s.f. Looking at, beholding, observing, seeing, regarding; sight, view, look, aspect; any public show or spectacle, a sight; a play, dancing; conception, understanding, intellect; circumspection, consideration.
wety: Learned borrowing from Classical Sanskrit परीक्षा (parīkṣā).

def: s.m. Looking at, viewing, seeing, beholding; the eye; a public show or spectacle, a sight.
part. Looked at, viewed, beheld, seen.
part. adj. To be looked at, to be regarded, to be seen; worthy of being seen.
s.m. Love, affection, kindness, tender regard, kindliness, friendship
more: n. m. S. प्रेमन्, Pr. pemmam . Pure love or affection. 1. Sone kā dīpak, resham kī bātī, Prem kā tel jale sāri rātī . Wom. Song. 2. Prem piyālā so pīye jo sīs dachchhanā det, Lobhī sīs na de sake, nām prem kā let . Kabīr. prem-kahānī , n. f. A love tale. Prem kahānī kahat hūṅ, suno, sakhī rī, āë, Pī ḍhūṅḍhan ko ham gaiṅ, āīṅ āp gavāëṅ . Wom. Dohā.
s. m. Love, affection, friendship, kindness. پريمرنگراتا prem-rang-rātā, adj. Coloured with the die of love, strongly attached or in love, loving.
subs: adj. Devoted to the exercise of love
adj. & s.m. Intent on love, filled with affection, affectionate, loving, constant; — one who is constant in love, &c.
s.m. The quality or the essence of love
(-ke sāth), To be in love (with); to be fast friends (with)
adj. 'Coloured with the dye of love,' strongly attached (to), in love (with), enamoured (of)
s.m. 'Ocean of love'; the name of the tenth section of the Bhāgavat purāṇ, in which the love-sports of Kr̤ishṇa are related; an epithet of the Deity
adj. Connected with love, having relation to love
(-par), To show affection (for); to be enamoured (of)
s.f. A creeper; a parasitic plant
prem-vat, adj. Full of love, affectionate; — prem-vatī, s.f. Mistress, spouse
adj. Under the influence of love, over head and ears in love, deeply enamoured (of).
wety: Learned borrowing from Sanskrit प्रेमन् (preman) through Old Hindi प्रेम (prema).

def: adj. & s.m. Loving, affectionate, friendly; — an affectionate person; a lover.
s.m. Swinging; a swing.
adj. & s.m. Urging, impelling, inciting; directing, ordering; sending, despatching; — one who incites, &c.; inciter; sender.
adj. Having the sense of inciting, or of the causal verb; — preraṇārthak kriyā, s.f. the causal verb.
more: s. m. 1. The act of sending. 2. Command.

def: adj. Having the sense of inciting, or of the causal verb; — preraṇārthak kriyā, s.f. the causal verb.
more: s. m. 1. The act of sending. 2. Command.

def: s.m. One who urges; instigator; sender; director, commander.
part. adj. & s.m. Urged, incited, impelled; sent, directed, despatched; — envoy, messenger; apostle, missionary.
s.m. A printing-press; printing office.
part. Sent away; sent, despatched (on an errand); ordered, directed ( = prerit).
s.f. Mistress, sweetheart, wife.
adj. Dearest, very dear, most beloved; most agreeable, most desired.
part. adj. & s.m. To be sent or despatched, proper to be sent; — a messenger, servant.

s.m. 'Half month of the departed, i.e. of the manes'; the dark half of the month (properly of the Gauṇa Aśvin, so called as peculiarly appointed for the celebration of obsequial rites to the pitr̤is or manes)
more: n. m. S. प्र + इ to go forth. Pālī. peto . The unclean spirit of a deceased person doomed for one year to traverse the infernal regions. Bin bhaë pret nahīṅ . Prov. No fear, no devil. paret sharādh, paret kiryā yā karm , n. m. The obsequies performed to purify the unclean spirit in the infernal regions, and speed its flight to the pitr-lok the abode of gods.
s. m. A departed soul, a spirit of the dead, ghost, evil spirit, fiend.
subs: vulg. paret-śarādh, s.m. Obsequial ceremonies offered to a departed relative during the year of his demise; — obsequial ceremonies in honour of the dead or of deceased ancestors
s.m., pret-kārya, s.m., pret-kriyā (vulg. paret-kiryā), s.f. = pret-śraddh, q.v.
s.m. 'House of the dead,' burying-ground, cemetery
s.m. The world of the dead, the region of disembodied spirits (in which they remain for one year, or until the obsequial rites are completed)
s.f. The river of the dead, the river of hell

def: s.f. A female ghost, demon or evil spirit.
more: s. f. A female ghost, demon, or evil spirit. See پريت pret.

def: s.f. Asking, questioning; question, inquiry.
adj. & s.m. Inquiring; one who asks or inquires after; inquirer, querist, investigator; inquisitive person.
s.m. Asking, inquiring, questioning, investigating.
s.f. A species of leguminous plant, Trigonella corniculata.
s.f. Contact, touch, contiguity.
part. Asked, inquired, questioned, interrogated, demanded.
s.m. The back; the hinder part of anything, the rear; the upper side, uppermost part, surface (see pīṭh)
adj. Variegated, party-coloured, dappled, piebald, speckled, spotted; manifold, diverse, various
more: n. m. Pr. panho . A question; enquiry.
subs: s.f. 'Having variegated leaves,' the plant Hemionitis cordifolia.

def: s.f. The aquatic plant Pistia stratiotes ( = praśnī).
s.f. A female friend, &c. (see prīt).
part. Pleased, delighted, gladdened, satistied; joyful, happy; beloved, loved, dear; gracious, kind, affectionate.
more: n. f. S. प्रिति love. 1. Love. See پيار 1. Tāl sūkh parpaṭ bhayā, hansā kahīṅ na jāë, Pichhlī prit ke kārne kaṅkar chun chun khāë . Dohā. The tank dried up and earth cakes formed, the swan yet constant stays, Sticks to the soil he loved so well, picks pebbles all his days. 2. Prīt jo kare īkh se jā meṅ ras kī khān, Gāṅṭh gāṅṭh meṅ ras nahīṅ, yehī prīt kī hān . Dohā. The fair and false one's love is as the sugar-cane, A luscious fount of sweet with knots that lovers pain. 3. Prīt na ṭūṭe an mile, uttam man kī lāg, Sau jug pānī meṅ rahe, chakmak taje na āg . Dohā. The mind that's good its love no absence e'er can cool, Sunken for years no water can the flint's fire cool. 4. Tore more prīt jagat jāne, ho jagat jāne, Jas Gaṅgā meṅ Jamnā lahar māre . E. Rus. Our loves the whole world knows, the whole world knows, As Ganges' waves with Jamnā meet and close. 5. Prīt na jāne jāt ku-jāt, nīnd na …

def: s. m. For the pleasure or pleasing.

ety: the final k changing for euphony to g in comp. before certain letters
def: conj. Separate, single, several; separately, singly, severally, distinctly; apart from, besides, with exception of, except, without
subs: s.m. Individualized spirit, the spirit of an individual as detached from universal spirit or the soul of the universe
adv. One by one, separately, with regular intervals
s.f. 'Diverse-leaved'; a species of plant, Hemionitis cordifolia
s.f. 'Diverse-barked'; a species of aloe, Sanseviera zeylanica (com. called Mūrvā)
s.m. Making separate, separating, distinguishing, setting apart
part. Separated, severed, sundered, cut off; made distinct
adj. Of different kinds, various, diversified, multiform.

def: s.f. = S پرتهکتو पृथक्त्व pr̤ithaktva, s.m. Separateness, separation, diversity, severalty; singleness, individuality.
s.m. = S پرتهکتا पृथक्ता pr̤ithaktā, s.f. Separateness, separation, diversity, severalty; singleness, individuality.
s.f. = pr̤ithivī, q.v.
more: n. f. S. पृथ्वी. The earth; ground ( bhūm ); the world. pirthī-nāth,—pāl,—rāj , n. m. Cherisher or lord of the earth; a king; a sovereign.

def: s. m. Lord of the earth; a sovereign, a king.
s.f. The wide world, the earth, Earth personified (as the mother of all beings); earth, land, ground, soil; a kind of metre in Sanskrit prosody
subs: s.m. A species of the atyasti metre
prithvī-pālak, s.m. 'Guardian of the earth,' king, sovereign, ruler
s.m. 'Lord of the earth,' prince, king, sovereign
s.m. Surface of the earth, ground, bare ground, the very earth
s.m. 'Reigning over the earth,' prince, king, sovereign
s.m. The earth considered as a world, the terrestrial world
s.m. The circuit or whole surface of the earth
s.m. 'Lord of the earth' = pr̤ithivī-pati, q.v.
ex: جو چار کونے ہَیں پِرْتِھْوی کے رَہیں گے قائِم اُنْہیں کے دَم سے ہَوا ہَے اَب تَک نَہ کوئِی ہوگا جَہاں میں جَیسے یہ بِیر ہوںْگے
jo cār kone ha͠i pirthivī ke rahẽ ge qāim unhẽ ke dam se havā hai ab tak na koī hogā jahā̃ mẽ jaise ye bīr hõge
(please add an English translation of this quotation)

def: adj. & s.m. Broad, wide, expansive, large, extensive, spacious; — name of the fifth monarch of the solar dynasty (in the second age); name of an ancient king, the son of Ven, rājā of Bettūr (who was married to a form of the goddess Lakshmī, and taught men to cultivate the earth, &c.); — s.f. A pungent seed, Nigella Indica; a medicinal substance (commonly called hingu-pattrī); opium
subs: (pr̤ithu+udara), adj. Big-bellied, stout, corpulent; — s.m. A ram

def: n. prop. Name of an ancient Rājā, son of Vena, Rājā of Bettoor. He was married to a form of the goddess Laksh̤mī, taught men to cultivate the earth, &c.
adj. See s.v. pr̤ithu.
s.f. = S پرتهتو पृथुत्व pr̤ithutva, s.m. Breadth, width, largeness, greatness.
s.m. = S پرتهتا पृथुता pr̤ithutā, s.f. Breadth, width, largeness, greatness.

s.f. Pleasure, joy, delight, gladness, happiness; enjoyment, gratification, satisfaction; graciousness, grace, favour, kindness; friendliness, friendship, liking, fondness (for), amity, regard, harmony, affection, love; — love personified as the wife of Kām-dev; name of the second nakshatra
subs: adv. Through favour or kind regard; in an affectionate manner, kindly, graciously, affectionately
prīti-dāya, s.m. 'Gift of love,' a present made from love or affection, a kind or friendly present, token of affection
prīti-kārī, prīti-kar, adj. Causing pleasure; inspiring love or affection, pleasing, agreeable: friendly, kind, affectionate
(-se, or -ke sang), To show affection (for), to make friends (with), to love
adj. Having love or affection (for), loving, fond, affectionate, kind, friendly, charitable
priti-yukt, vulg. prīti-yut, adj. = prīti-mān, q.v.

def: s.f. An army; division of an army consisting of two hundred and forty-three elephants, the same number of chariots, seven hundred and twenty-nine horses, and twelve hundred and fifteen foot
subs: s.m. The commander of an army.

def: adj. & s.m. (f. -ā) Beloved, dear (to), valued, prized, liked, desired; pleasing, amiable, agreeable, kind; — a beloved object, lover, husband; — a species of medicinal plant (com. called riddhi), a kind of drug
subs: s.m. Speaking kindly; kind or friendly speech
adj. & s.m. Speaking kindly, &c. = priya-vādī, q.v.
adj. & s.m. Dearest, most beloved; — a beloved, darling; a favourite friend; lover, sweetheart, husband
adj. & s.m. Pleasant or grateful to the sight; good-looking, handsome, beautiful, lovely; — a lovely-looking person; the look of a friend; a kind of date-tree, Terminalia tomentosa; Mimusops kauki
s.f. A dear female friend or companion, a confidante
s.m. A tree with fragrant flowers, Michelia champaca

priya-kārī, priya-kar, adj. & s.m. Doing a kindness (to), doing a favour, acting kindly (towards), treating kindly; causing pleasure or enjoyment, giving pleasure; kind, favourable, affectionate, beneficent; — a kind person, benefactor, friend, &c.
adj. & s.m. Beloved, dear; affectionate, loving; — a beloved person; an affectionate person
(priyam, neut. of priya), part. adj. & s.m. Become dear, beloved (by); one who has become an object of affection
s.f. = priyam-bhāvukatva, s.m. The having become dear or beloved; becoming beloved; amiability
adj. & s.m. Speaking kindly or agreeably, speaking affectionately; sweet-spoken, pleasant-spoken; flattering; — a pleasant-spoken person; a flatterer
s.m. A word of love, or of kindness
s.f. A creeping plant, Echites frutescens.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian پری (parī), from Middle Persian plyk' (parīg).

def: s.m. Love; service, kindness, favour; what is pleasing (to), will, pleasure
subs: (-kā), To do the will or pleasure (of).

def: See پري priya.
s.f. A beloved woman, favourite, darling, dear, sweetheart, mistress, wife; — priyā-vān, priyā-vat, adj. Having a mistress or sweetheart; being in love (with), enamoured (of).
more: adj. S. प्रिय Beloved. See پيارا priyā , n. f. A sweetheart; a favorite. he priye! intj. My love! my dear!
1. (or priya प्रिय ) adj. m. 2. ( प्रिया ) adj. f. Beloved, dear; sweetheart. هي پريي he priye, My dear!

def: adj. & s.m. See s.v. priya for compounds having that word for the first member.
s.m. A kind of variegated or spotted deer; a kind of bird; a bee; the plants Nauclea cadamba and Terminalia tomentosa.

adj. See s.v. priya. adj. & s.m. (f. -ā) Beloved, dear (to), valued, prized, liked, desired; pleasing, amiable, agreeable, kind; — a beloved object, lover, husband; — a species of medicinal plant (com. called riddhi), a kind of drug
subs: s.m. Speaking kindly; kind or friendly speech
adj. & s.m. Speaking kindly, &c. = priya-vādī, q.v.
adj. & s.m. Dearest, most beloved; — a beloved, darling; a favourite friend; lover, sweetheart, husband
adj. & s.m. Pleasant or grateful to the sight; good-looking, handsome, beautiful, lovely; — a lovely-looking person; the look of a friend; a kind of date-tree, Terminalia tomentosa; Mimusops kauki
s.f. A dear female friend or companion, a confidante
s.m. A tree with fragrant flowers, Michelia champaca

priya-kārī, priya-kar, adj. & s.m. Doing a kindness (to), doing a favour, acting kindly (towards), treating kindly; causing pleasure or enjoyment, giving pleasure; kind, favourable, affectionate, beneficent; — a kind person, benefactor, friend, &c.
adj. & s.m. Beloved, dear; affectionate, loving; — a beloved person; an affectionate person
(priyam, neut. of priya), part. adj. & s.m. Become dear, beloved (by); one who has become an object of affection
s.f. = priyam-bhāvukatva, s.m. The having become dear or beloved; becoming beloved; amiability
adj. & s.m. Speaking kindly or agreeably, speaking affectionately; sweet-spoken, pleasant-spoken; flattering; — a pleasant-spoken person; a flatterer
s.m. A word of love, or of kindness
s.f. A creeping plant, Echites frutescens.

def: s.m. The tree Buchanania latifolia.
s.m. Panic seed, Italian millet, Panicum italicum; — a medicinal plant and perfume (described as a fragrant seed, sometimes called phalī); — black mustard seed, Sinapis ramosa; — long pepper.
s.f. Dearness, the being dear or beloved; the being fond of, affection, love.
adj. & s.m. Most beloved, dearest; — a favourite, friend, beloved, lover, sweetheart, husband ( = pītam).
more: adj. S. प्रियतम. Dearest; most beloved; affectionate. prītam, pītam , n. m. One held dear. See bālam, Prītam prītam sab kaheṅ, prītam jāne na koë, Ek ber joṅ prītam mile, sadā anand phir hoë . Dohā. My God beloved, my God beloved, all call upon, none know, Your heart's desire once found, with joy eternal overflow.
adj. superl. Dearest, most beloved; s. m. A favourite, friend, beloved, lover, sweetheart, husband. See پيتم pītam.

def: s.m. The act of sprinkling with water (esp. for purification), consecration by sprinkling; immolation of victims, killing (animals in sacrifice); a text to be repeated when an animal is sacrificed.
part. Sprinkled, purified by sprinkling; offered in sacrifice; immolated, slaughtered, killed.
part. Announced, declared, laid down (as a rule or axiom), said, told, uttered.
part. adj. Sojourning abroad or in a foreign country; away from home, absent, abroad
subs: s.f. A woman whose husband is abroad.

def: s.m.f. A bench, stool; a kind of carp, Cyprinus pausius
subs: s.m. The month Bhādra or Bhādoṅ (Aug.-Sept.)
s.f. 'The foot of a stool'; name of the twenty-sixth and twenty-seventh asterism (containing the stars in the wing of Pegasus)
s.f. The full moon in Bhādoṅ.

def: s.m. Great exertion or effort; great zeal, ardour; stimulus, incitement.
s.m. Instigator, inciter, exhorter, (in Law) the instigator of any crime
s.m. The act of inspiriting or inciting, instigation, stimulating to bold and vigorous effort.
part. Incited, instigated, stimulated, encouraged.
s.m. = pūʼā, q.v. s.m. A cake made of flour and sugar and fried in ghī or oil.
s.m. A cake made of flour and sugar and fried in ghī or oil.
more: n. m. S. अपूप A sweet flour cake.
s. m. 1. A quarter. 2. A weight or measure of a quarter of a ser.

def: adj. (Old H.) = pūrva, q.v.

adj. Empty, worthless, vain, absurd, of no moment or consequence, useless, unsubstantial, unsound, feeble, weak; petty, trivial, trifling, insignificant; unmeaning, nonsensical, inordinate, injudicious; vile, obscene, scurrilous; mean, low, base, shabby, scurvy; low-born; — s.m. A thing of no consequence, a mere nothing; absurdity, nonsense, obscenity, &c.
more: adj. lit . Empty. 1. Useless; worthless; of no value or stamina; of no account or consequence. 2. Petty; trivial; trifling; insignificant. 3. Unmeaning; nonsensical; absurd. 4. Mean; base; vile; low-born. 5. Shabby; scurvy; snobbish.

adj. Absurd, of no moment or consequence, useless, nonsense, nonsensical, obscene, inordinate, injudicious. پوچ گو pūch-go, Talking nonsense. پوچ گوٴي pūch-go-ī or پوچ بافي pūch-bāf-ī, s. f. Talking (or weaving) nonsense.
(dakh.) On: see پو po or پر par.
subs: adj. & s.m. Talking nonsense; using obscene language; — one who talks nonsense, &c. babbler, prater

def: s.m. A woollen rag for applying grease or ointment (to); plaister-brush, brush (for white-washing, &c.); sponge (of a gun); a thin coating of clay or white-wash
more: n. m. 1. A thin coating of clay or whitewash. 2. The sponge of a gun, press, engine, etc.; a whitewasher's brush ( potā ). puchārā phernā, yā denā , v. a. 1. To lay on a thin coating of clay or whitewash. 2. To wipe with a wet cloth; sponge (a gun, etc.). 3. To pat; soap; butter; soft sawder. 4. To encourage; excite; instigate. Saiṅyāṅ mor äpe birūjhal, log dihal pochārā, Lāt mukā ham sahlauṅ, aur pablaoṅ du gārā . Bhoj. Prov. My husband vexed already was, folks did excite him more, Kicks, blows likewise I had to bear, and of abuse a shower. 5. To embellish; adorn; decorate. 6. To give a gloss to; glaze; clean; color.

s. m. 1. A thin coat of clay for laying on a wall. 2. The sponge of a gun. پچاراپهيرنا puchārā phernā, To sponge a gun. پچارادينا puchārā denā, To lay a thin coat of clay on the walls of a house; to whitewash a wall.
subs: (-par), pućārā denā (-ko), To wipe with a wet, or a greasy, cloth; to lay on a thin coat of clay or whitewash; to sponge (a gun); to give a gloss (to), to polish, clean, embellish, adorn; to soap, butter, soft sawder; to excite, instigate.

def: s.m.f. (?), Tail; hinder part (see pūṅćh).
s.f. lit. 'Per tail'; a tax on cattle.
s.f. Inquiry, question, interrogation; inquiry (after), call (for); investigation, examination
subs: pūćh-pićār, pūćh-pāćh, pūćh-paćh, pūćh-tāćh, pūćh-gaćh, s.f. Inquiry, interrogation, inquisition, inquisitiveness; investigation, examination

def: Nonsensical, absurd, nonsense.
s. (dakh.) Inquisition, inquiry, interrogation, investigation, inquisitiveness.
n. m. A sound adressed to an animal to quiet or call him.
s.m. (Used in comp.) = pūćh
more: n. f. S. पृच्छा Consulting an ojhā , q. v.
subs: s.m. = pūćhā-pāćhī, s.f. = pūćhā-tāćhī, s.f. = pūćhā-gaćhī, s.f. Inquiry, investigation, &c. = pūćh-pāćh, q.v.
(-kī), To investigate, &c.; to look into; to audit (accounts).
